Haolin Yan （闫 浩霖）

Pursuing an AI Master’s at Tsinghua University, specializing in the integration of Computer Networks and AI.

haolinyan | yhl23@mails.tsinghua.edu.cn

News

Congratulations! Our new in-network classification work, “LINC: Enabling Low-Resource In-Network Classification and Incremental Model Update,” has been accepted by IEEE ICNP 2024. The code is available at https://github.com/haolinyan/LINC.

Research Interests

In-Network Computing, Machine Learning Systems, Traffic Classification

Education

Tsinghua University, Beijing, China
MSc in Artificial Intelligence, Sep 2023 - Jun 2026

Xidian University, Xi’an, China
BSc in Artificial Intelligence, Sep 2019 - Jun 2023

Publications

[1] G. Xie, Q. Li, H. Yan, D. Zhao, G. Antichi and Y. Jiang, “Efficient Attack Detection with Multi-Latency Neural Models on Heterogeneous Network Devices,” 2023 IEEE 31st International Conference on Network Protocols (ICNP), Reykjavik, Iceland, 2023, pp. 1-12, doi: 10.1109/ICNP59255.2023.10355579. The code is available at https://github.com/xgr19/SOTERIA.
